props.title: Frequently Asked Questions about Furnace Repair in {city}

faqs.question: How much does furnace repair typically cost?
faqs.answer: Furnace repair costs vary depending on the issue, but most repairs range from $150 to $500. We provide upfront pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: How do I know if my furnace needs repair or replacement?
faqs.answer: If your furnace is over 15-20 years old, requires frequent repairs, makes unusual noises, or struggles to heat your home evenly, replacement may be more cost-effective. Our technicians will assess your unit and provide honest recommendations.

faqs.question: How long does a furnace repair take?
faqs.answer: Most furnace repairs are completed within 1-2 hours. More complex issues like heat exchanger problems may take longer, but we'll keep you informed throughout the process.
